channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Harris and Trump target Michigan as both parties try to shore up 'blue wall' votes
item.description: GRAND RAPIDS, Mich. (AP) — Kamala Harris and Donald Trump will both be scouring for votes in Michigan on Friday as they try to lock down support in this key political battleground.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vicente Gonzalez and Mayra Flores clash in fiery South Texas congressional debate
item.description: In their only debate before Election Day, Gonzalez and Flores traded jabs over the economy, immigration and abortion, and regularly spoke over each other.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Berenice Garcia, KPRC 2

item.title: Republicans appeal a Georgia judge’s ruling that invalidates seven election rules
item.description: The state and national Republican parties are appealing a judge’s ruling that said seven election rules recently passed by Georgia’s State Election Board are “illegal, unconstitutional and void.”.
item.dc:creator: Kate Brumback And Jeff Amy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: From the 'Shark Tank' to the campaign trail: Mark Cuban teams up with Kamala Harris
item.description: Billionaire businessman Mark Cuban steps up his campaign efforts for Vice President Kamala Harris - with stops in battleground Wisconsin - as she faces off against former President Trump
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Zelenskyy victory plan: Replace US troops at outposts in Europe with battle-hardened Ukrainians
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s victory plan includes bringing Ukraine into NATO and replacing U.S. troops with battle-hardened Ukrainian ones at outposts throughout Europe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court Friday, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access — such as allowing it to be mailed without an in-person doctor’s visit.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden is making quick trip to Berlin before US election to discuss Ukraine and democracy with allies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden has long believed diplomacy is about personal relationships — and he'll spend Friday in Berlin with German Chancellor Olaf Scholz as his time in office is on the cusp of ending.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Majority of Pennsylvania county sheriffs 'wholeheartedly endorse' Trump for president
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Forty-nine of the 67 county sheriffs in battleground state Pennsylvania endorsed former President Trump on Thursday, saying they are “confident in his leadership and ability to safeguard our country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WATCH: Nevada US Senate Debate: Jacky Rosen and Sam Brown
item.description: As the seconds tick away until Election Day on Nov. 5, Democratic incumbent Sen. Jacky Rosen and Republican challenger Sam Brown are set to debate the issues Nevadans are most concerned about heading into 2025 and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Following death of Hamas leader, Harris says it's 'time for the day after to begin' in Gaza
item.description: Democratic presidential nominee Kamala Harris says the death of Hamas’ top leader, Yahya Sinwar, “gives us an opportunity to finally end the war in Gaza.”.
item.dc:creator: Chris Megerian And Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Early voting begins in North Carolina, officials helping after Helene
item.description: With the election less than three weeks away, many residents are still reeling from Helene. This has led to some drastic changes to the voting process.
item.dc:creator: Devan Markham, NewsNation

item.title: GOP cringes over Trump’s vow to wield military against opponents
item.description: Former President Trump’s incendiary comments about deploying the military and using other powers of the executive branch to pursue his political enemies, including a sitting member of Congress, is putting downballot Republican candidates on the defensive.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways from the last full fundraising quarter before Election Day
item.description: Federal candidates have submitted their reports for what was the final full fundraising quarter before Election Day, offering a snapshot of their financial status with just three weeks to go.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, NewsNation

item.title: The Latest: Harris keeps a focus on 'blue wall' states in the campaign's final weeks
item.description: With three weeks left in the presidential campaign, Democrat Kamala Harris is spending most of her days trying to shore up support in the “blue wall” states of Pennsylvania, Michigan and Wisconsin as she tries to avoid a repeat of Hillary Clinton’s collapse there eight years ago.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: McConnell privately slammed Trump as ‘stupid’ and ‘despicable’ after 2020 election
item.description: Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.) privately slammed former President Donald Trump as “stupid as well as being ill-tempered” and “a despicable human being” after the 2020 election, according to a biography of the senator set to be released later this month.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden admin slapped with major lawsuit over alleged refusal to help state purge noncitizens from voter rolls
item.description: Florida is suing the Biden administration over what it alleges is a refusal by the Department of Homeland Security to aid in its efforts to remove noncitizens from the voter rolls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris barnstorms Wisconsin in 1-day swing state tour targeting young voters
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris is barnstorming in swing state Wisconsin on Thursday with only weeks to go until the election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump tried a friendlier pitch with Latino voters at a Univision town hall
item.description: During a town hall outside Miami, Trump touted his record on the economy, yet called Jan. 6 a "day of love" and would not back off false claims about Haitian migrants eating pets in Springfield, Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: Florida elections officials seek flexibility on voting rules after hurricanes
item.description: Florida's recent hurricanes could make it difficult for voters in affected areas to cast their ballots in the upcoming election unless Gov. Ron DeSantis waives and modifies some rules, county election supervisors said in a letter to state officials.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ag leaders voice concerns over negative impacts of tariffs proposed in presidential election
item.description: Midwestern agricultural leaders say they are concerned new tariffs being suggested by former President Donald Trump as part of his reelection bid could result in a damaging trade war. They say it could cost the corn and soybeans billions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Trump spends big on anti-trans ads for 2024 election
item.description: Trump spends more on ads about transgender women and girls in sports and gender transitions than on Bidenomics, fracking and taxes.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: Man arrested near Trump Coachella rally with gun sues for defamation
item.description: The man arrested near former President Trump’s Coachella, Calif., rally over the weekend sued the Riverside County sheriff for defamation and other claims, saying there were “preposterous allegations” made about the incident possibly being an assassination attempt.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk has given $75 million, so far, to put Donald Trump back in the White House
item.description: Elon Musk is among the largest financial supporters of Donald Trump's reelection efforts, new FEC filings show. He and two other megadonors collectively gave $300 million to support Trump.
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel, MPR News

item.title: FEMA leader: Misinformation about hurricane operations must stop
item.description: "The ongoing spread of misinformation about operations is not OK," FEMA Administrator Deanne Criswell said.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Migrant deaths in New Mexico have increased tenfold
item.description: Experts say smugglers are treating migrants more harshly and bringing them on paths that could be more dangerous in extreme summer temperatures.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Giant pandas will arrive at D.C.'s National Zoo this week
item.description: After an 11-month wait, giant pandas will populate the zoo once again. A pair of pandas, which left China on FedEx's "Panda Express" cargo jet, are expected to arrive in the D.C. area on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx, MPR News

item.title: Lisa Cole, Nevada Assembly District 4 candidate, discusses economic development, affordable housing, and education
item.description: Lisa Cole, a candidate for Nevada Assembly District 4, appeared on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide to discuss her platform.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NJ lawmakers' fight against teen vaping continues with new bill
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) -- The fight against youth vaping continues in the Garden State as some Trenton lawmakers are trying to pass a law prohibiting the delivery of electronic smoking devices to people under 21, requiring someone over 21 to sign off on the delivery.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Harris helps pack aid boxes for North Carolina hurricane victims ahead of Sunday campaign push
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris on Saturday helped pack diapers into boxes of personal care products destined for North Carolina hurricane victims, agreeing with one helper who said “it takes a village.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rebuilding Florida after Hurricane Milton and protecting against scams
item.description:
Recovery efforts can unite communities after catastrophic damage. Neighbors come together to help one another, while state officials and law enforcement work diligently to restore order. Gradually, residents begin to see their homes return to normalcy.
But even with the good, comes the bad.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Henderson City Council candidate Dr. Monica Larson discusses government transparency, public safety, and housing
item.description: Henderson City Council candidate Dr. Monica Larson joined the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide Friday to discuss issues she believes need to be addressed in the city.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News
